paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.79, with a 10.87 percent increase from the prior close and a 24.36 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions. The price is current as of 2026-07-21.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G filed on 2026-07-20 and multiple 8-K filings, including one on 2026-07-15 announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes due 2031.
